title: Looking for Teacher at NIT Warangal International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at NIT Warangal International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Warangal International Enterprises:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal International Enterprises!
